lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Leave us to our fate. We care nothing for the world that betrayed us, or those that come from it.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: So have you spoken to my Lord Azzanadra yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I have.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: And what words did he have for his followers?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er.... He didn't really mention you at all, but he did teach me some cool new magic spells.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: It is understandable perhaps... His poor mind must be addled after all of those years of confinement, he would not willingly ignore his followers...

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Anyway, if he has taught you our ancient magics, you may be interested in purchasing an ancient heirloom that was passed down to me. My ancestor fought in the ancient battles using the

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: magic of our god. This heirloom will help you with the speed of your spell- casting.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Normally I could not bear to part with such a priceless relic, but for your help in freeing my Lord Azzanadra, I will be prepared to sell it to you for a mere 80,000 gold.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Are you interested?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Stranger... Do not abuse my generosity... I cannot possibly sell it for less than 80,000 gold.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Come back and see me when you have the necessary funds to buy.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Take care of it, it is the only heirloom from those times I possess, although rumour has it many of our ancient warriors were buried with identical weapons so that they could continue to fight for my Lord in their deaths.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: As you wish. Bear my offer in mind should you ever change your decision, I will remain here.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after buying the ancient staff

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Greetings!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this weird icon. Do you know what it is?

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Fascinating... I've never seen anything like this before, but the magic contained within is unmistakable. I wonder...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wonder what?

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Stranger, if you were to bring me an Ancient staff, I believe it would be possible to combine it with this icon to create a powerful new weapon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds pretty neat.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Then return to me when you have the staff.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: I see you have the staff with you. Would you like me to combine your Ancient staff with the icon to create an Ancient sceptre? You won't be able to separate them once this is done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please!

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: There you go. Wield its power responsibly, stranger...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks.

lines.speaker: Eblis
lines.text: Suit yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you got any symbols of your god?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it.
